text: Chest x-ray showed haziness in the left side and a bronchoscopic examination showed near complete occlusion at the distal left main bronchus.
Thoracic contrast scan showed features of bronchial torsion.
Immediate re-exploration and corrective pneumonectomy was done.
This video shows bronchoscopic appearance of bronchial torsion, which is a rare complication following lobar resection.
